name: beaker-monorepo
description: npm workspace root for beaker-ts, beaker-vue, and beaker-ui

scripts.build: npm run build -w beaker-kernel && npm run build -w beaker-vue && npm run build -w beaker-ui
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check -w beaker-kernel && npm run type-check -w beaker-vue && npm run type-check -w beaker-ui
